title: Domicile
doc_html:
§684. Domicile

            The offices of the director of capitol security shall be domiciled in the state capitol complex in Baton Rouge.

            Acts 2022, No. 507, §1, eff. June 16, 2022.
doc_text:
§684.  Domicile
The offices of the director of capitol security shall be domiciled in the state capitol
complex in Baton Rouge.
Acts 2022, No. 507, §1, eff. June 16, 2022.
